info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/authentication/%7Bid%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/authentication/%7Bid%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/authentication/%7Bid%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"type":"feishu","config":{"appId":"string","appSecret":"string"},"id":"string","name":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"type\":\"feishu\",\"config\":{\"appId\":\"string\",\"appSecret\":\"string\"},\"id\":\"string\",\"name\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/authentication/%7Bid%7D", payload, headers)
